entry.title: Audisi Stand Up Comedy Rigen: Kalian Tau Ga Alasan Kuda Makan Rumput? Ternyata… - SUCI 5

link.title: Audisi Stand Up Comedy Rigen: Kalian Tau Ga Alasan Kuda Makan Rumput? Ternyata… - SUCI 5

entry.content:
SURABAYA, KOMPAS.TV - Muhammad Rizki Rakelna atau yang dikenal dengan Rigen merupakan peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5) asal Nusa Tenggara Barat.
Seperti apa penampilan Rigen dalam audisi ini? Yuk nonton video berikut ini!
——————————————————————————————————————-
SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun.
Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy.
SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8.
Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka.
Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya.
Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi.
#Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5
entry.summary: SURABAYA, KOMPAS.TV - Muhammad Rizki Rakelna atau yang dikenal dengan Rigen merupakan peserta audisi Stand Up Comedy Indonesia season 5 (SUCI 5) asal Nusa Tenggara Barat. Seperti apa penampilan Rigen dalam audisi ini? Yuk nonton video berikut ini! ——————————————————————————————————————- SUCI 9 akan kembali lagi untuk menemani para pecinta setia Stand Up Comedy Indonesia, setelah vakum selama 1 tahun. Sambil menunggu hadirnya SUCI 9 di layar kaca, tim KompasTV akan menampilkan kembali video-video yang menarik sekaligus mengundang tawa para penonton Stand Up Comedy. SUCI akan bernostalgia melalui tayangan video dari SUCI 1 sampai SUCI 8. Tentunya dengan penampilan dari komika-komika ternama, yang pada waktu itu sedang merintis karier mereka. Untuk para pecinta SUCI yang mau request upload, silakan tinggalkan komen di bawah ya. Follow Stand Up Comedy KompasTV di Instagram: @sucikompastv untuk tahu informasi-informasi terupdate Stand Up Comedy Kompas TV, termasuk jadwal audisi. #Audisi #StandUpComedy #SUCI5

entry.title: June Cooks With Jackfruit For The First Time!

link.title: June Cooks With Jackfruit For The First Time!

entry.content: A fascinating "multiple fruit," a single jackfruit is actually composed of hundreds (or thousands!) of mature flowers, each of which are edible. Native to and most commonly used in South and Southeast Asia, it can be eaten raw when it’s ripe or cooked when it’s unripe. Here’s a few ideas on what to do with a ripe jackfruit!
entry.summary: A fascinating "multiple fruit," a single jackfruit is actually composed of hundreds (or thousands!) of mature flowers, each of which are edible. Native to and most commonly used in South and Southeast Asia, it can be eaten raw when it’s ripe or cooked when it’s unripe. Here’s a few ideas on what to do with a ripe jackfruit!

entry.title: 54 black heroes who deserve monuments in America [Mic Archives]

link.title: 54 black heroes who deserve monuments in America [Mic Archives]

entry.content: At Mic, we believe it’s time to honor black Americans who deserve monuments for their extraordinary contributions to history.

entry.title: Carme Artigas: ‘No hemos tardado en desarrollar la ‘app’’

link.title: Carme Artigas: ‘No hemos tardado en desarrollar la ‘app’’

entry.content: Carme Artigas, secretaria de Estado de Digitalización e Inteligencia Artificial, niega retraso en el desarrollo de la ‘app’ Radar Covid.

entry.title: Toddler Runs Excitedly Towards Father When He Arrives From Work

link.title: Toddler Runs Excitedly Towards Father When He Arrives From Work

entry.content:
This toddler shared a close relationship with his father, who worked on the road as a truck driver. So when he heard him pulling up his truck, this toddler got delighted and couldn’t control his excitement. He ran towards him like a rocket, throwing away his cap. His father picked him up in his arms and hugged him.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).
entry.summary: This toddler shared a close relationship with his father, who worked on the road as a truck driver. So when he heard him pulling up his truck, this toddler got delighted and couldn’t control his excitement. He ran towards him like a rocket, throwing away his cap. His father picked him up in his arms and hugged him. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rightsholder(s).

entry.title: Indian apps tried to fill China’s app TikTok Place Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Indian apps tried to fill China’s app TikTok Place Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
After indian government’s Stop usage of chinese video sharing app tiktok, indian apps tried to fill the dragan country’s app. but still they are in a way to make it possible.
#TikTokinindia
#Indianapps
#RelianceIndustriesinvestmentinTikTok
#TikTokRepalcementindianapps
#Chingari
#Sumitghosh
#TikTokinUS
#DonaldTrump
#MicrosofttoBuyTikTok
#TikTokMicrosoftdeal
#MukeshAmbani
#ChineseApps
#ChinaByteDance
#chinaapps
#TikTokvideos
#59MobileApps
#PUBG
#టిక్ టాక్
గల్వాన్ లోయలో భారతీయ సైనికులపై దాడి తర్వాత చైనాకు చెందిన యాప్‌లపై కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం వరుసగా నిషేధం విధిస్తోంది. అదే సమయంలో వీటి స్ధానంలో దేశీయ యాప్‌ల తయారీని ప్రోత్సహిస్తోంది. కానీ చైనాకు చెందిన బైట్ డ్యాన్స్ సంస్ధకు చెందిన వీడియో షేరింగ్ యాప్‌ టిక్‌ టాక్ స్ధానంలో పుట్టగొడుగుల్లా పుట్టుకొస్తున్న వందలాది యాప్‌లు ఆ లోటు భర్తీ చేయడంలో సఫలమవుతున్నాయా అనే ప్రశ్న తలెత్తుతోంది. అయితే దీనిపై మిశ్రమ స్పందన వస్తున్నా మెజారిటీ జనం మాత్రం టిక్‌ టాక్‌ లేని లోటు కనిపిస్తోందని చెబుతున్నారు. టిక్‌ టాక్ స్ధాయిని అందుకునేందుకు ప్రయత్నాలు మాత్రం జరుగుతూనే ఉన్నాయి. చైనాకు చెందిన బైట్ డ్యాన్స్ సంస్ధ సృష్టించిన టిక్‌ టాక్‌ యాప్ భారత్‌తో పాటు పలు దేశాల్లో సంచలనాలు రేపింది. అదే సమయంలో కేంద్రం ప్రోత్సాహంతో టిక్‌టాక్‌ను పోలిన వందల కొద్దీ యాప్‌లు ఇప్పుడు హల్‌చల్ చేస్తున్నాయి. వీటి విషయంలో మిశ్రమ అభిప్రాయాలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నా మేకిన్ ఇండియా ప్లాన్‌లో భాగంగా స్వదేశీ ప్రయత్నాలు మాత్రం మొదలయ్యాయని చెప్పవచ్చు. గతంలో దీనిపై అంతగా దృష్టిపెట్టని స్టార్టప్ సంస్ధలు కూడా ఇప్పుడు వీడియో షేరింగ్ యాప్‌లకు ఉన్న ఆదరణను గుర్తిస్తున్నాయి.
entry.summary: After indian government’s Stop usage of chinese video sharing app tiktok, indian apps tried to fill the dragan country’s app. but still they are in a way to make it possible. #TikTokinindia #Indianapps #RelianceIndustriesinvestmentinTikTok #TikTokRepalcementindianapps #Chingari #Sumitghosh #TikTokinUS #DonaldTrump #MicrosofttoBuyTikTok #TikTokMicrosoftdeal #MukeshAmbani #ChineseApps #ChinaByteDance #chinaapps #TikTokvideos #59MobileApps #PUBG #టిక్ టాక్ గల్వాన్ లోయలో భారతీయ సైనికులపై దాడి తర్వాత చైనాకు చెందిన యాప్‌లపై కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం వరుసగా నిషేధం విధిస్తోంది. అదే సమయంలో వీటి స్ధానంలో దేశీయ యాప్‌ల తయారీని ప్రోత్సహిస్తోంది. కానీ చైనాకు చెందిన బైట్ డ్యాన్స్ సంస్ధకు చెందిన వీడియో షేరింగ్ యాప్‌ టిక్‌ టాక్ స్ధానంలో పుట్టగొడుగుల్లా పుట్టుకొస్తున్న వందలాది యాప్‌లు ఆ లోటు భర్తీ చేయడంలో సఫలమవుతున్నాయా అనే ప్రశ్న తలెత్తుతోంది. అయితే దీనిపై మిశ్రమ స్పందన వస్తున్నా మెజారిటీ జనం మాత్రం టిక్‌ టాక్‌ లేని లోటు కనిపిస్తోందని చెబుతున్నారు. టిక్‌ టాక్ స్ధాయిని అందుకునేందుకు ప్రయత్నాలు మాత్రం జరుగుతూనే ఉన్నాయి. చైనాకు చెందిన బైట్ డ్యాన్స్ సంస్ధ సృష్టించిన టిక్‌ టాక్‌ యాప్ భారత్‌తో పాటు పలు దేశాల్లో సంచలనాలు రేపింది. అదే సమయంలో కేంద్రం ప్రోత్సాహంతో టిక్‌టాక్‌ను పోలిన వందల కొద్దీ యాప్‌లు ఇప్పుడు హల్‌చల్ చేస్తున్నాయి. వీటి విషయంలో మిశ్రమ అభిప్రాయాలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నా మేకిన్ ఇండియా ప్లాన్‌లో భాగంగా స్వదేశీ ప్రయత్నాలు మాత్రం మొదలయ్యాయని చెప్పవచ్చు. గతంలో దీనిపై అంతగా దృష్టిపెట్టని స్టార్టప్ సంస్ధలు కూడా ఇప్పుడు వీడియో షేరింగ్ యాప్‌లకు ఉన్న ఆదరణను గుర్తిస్తున్నాయి.

entry.title: Fishbourne Roman Palace - ‘Incredible boost’ for fundraising campaign after visit by Tom Holland

link.title: Fishbourne Roman Palace - ‘Incredible boost’ for fundraising campaign after visit by Tom Holland

entry.content: Best-selling author and historian Tom Holland visited Fishbourne Roman Palace over the weekend, as part of his Sussex museum tour, to boost a heritage charity’s fundraising campaign.
entry.summary: Best-selling author and historian Tom Holland visited Fishbourne Roman Palace over the weekend, as part of his Sussex museum tour, to boost a heritage charity’s fundraising campaign.

entry.title: Savez-vous à quoi ressemble l’odeur de la Lune ?

link.title: Savez-vous à quoi ressemble l’odeur de la Lune ?

entry.content:
ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos :
À partir des témoignages d’astronautes, et en s’appuyant sur la composition du sol, un généticien a imaginé l’odeur de la Lune dans le cadre d’une exposition à la Cité de l’Espace à Toulouse. Une odeur perçue différemment selon les capteurs olfactifs des uns et des autres.
Retrouvez "Le journal de la mi-journée " sur :
LE DIRECT :
Retrouvez-nous sur :
Notre site :
Facebook :
Twitter :
Google + :
Pinterest :
entry.summary: ABONNEZ-VOUS pour plus de vidéos : À partir des témoignages d’astronautes, et en s’appuyant sur la composition du sol, un généticien a imaginé l’odeur de la Lune dans le cadre d’une exposition à la Cité de l’Espace à Toulouse. Une odeur perçue différemment selon les capteurs olfactifs des uns et des autres. entry.title: Top 10 Most Shocking Twists in Mortal Kombat

link.title: Top 10 Most Shocking Twists in Mortal Kombat

entry.content: Whoever knew a game about ripping spines and cracking skulls would have some startling plot twists? For this list, we’re looking at some of the most surprising plot twists to have occurred across the “Mortal Kombat” franchise.
entry.summary: Whoever knew a game about ripping spines and cracking skulls would have some startling plot twists? For this list, we’re looking at some of the most surprising plot twists to have occurred across the “Mortal Kombat” franchise.

entry.title: Barbie Iron Set- Washing Machine Toys- Barbie doll house cleaning- Toys for kids- Fun for kids

link.title: Barbie Iron Set- Washing Machine Toys- Barbie doll house cleaning- Toys for kids- Fun for kids

entry.content:

entry.title: ‘How do you stick the pages together?’ Alison Lester answers children’s questions – video

link.title: ‘How do you stick the pages together?’ Alison Lester answers children’s questions – video

entry.content: The writer and illustrator’s books – including Are We There Yet? and Magic Beach – have enchanted Australian kids for generations. As part of Guardian Australia’s ongoing series, we got Alison Lester’s readers to do the heavy lifting and ask her their pressing questions. Here, she reveals the location of the real Magic Beach, offers some drawing tips, and shows off her cat.
entry.summary: The writer and illustrator’s books – including Are We There Yet? and Magic Beach – have enchanted Australian kids for generations. As part of Guardian Australia’s ongoing series, we got Alison Lester’s readers to do the heavy lifting and ask her their pressing questions. Here, she reveals the location of the real Magic Beach, offers some drawing tips, and shows off her cat.

entry.title: Ranking: festejos de la historia de River

link.title: Ranking: festejos de la historia de River

entry.content: Celebraciones de goles que quedaron inmortalizadas en tatuajes y cuadros. Te mostramos las mejores en River.
entry.summary: Celebraciones de goles que quedaron inmortalizadas en tatuajes y cuadros. Te mostramos las mejores en River.

entry.title: Airforce Official Surprises Best Friend With Visit

link.title: Airforce Official Surprises Best Friend With Visit

entry.content: This guy was at his workplace. His best friend, who was away at the Airforce boot camp, snuck up behind him. He was pleasantly surprised and exclaimed happily. He climbed on to him and hugged him for a while before introducing his friend to his coworkers.
entry.summary: This guy was at his workplace. His best friend, who was away at the Airforce boot camp, snuck up behind him. He was pleasantly surprised and exclaimed happily. He climbed on to him and hugged him for a while before introducing his friend to his coworkers.

entry.title: Pesawat Kargo Georgia Terbengkalai di Turki

link.title: Pesawat Kargo Georgia Terbengkalai di Turki

entry.content:
Sebuah pesawat kargo Georgia yang mendarat di bandara di sebelah timur Turki sudah lebih dari 9 tahun terbengkalai.
Sebelumnya, pesawat kargo Sky Georgia Ilyushing Il-76TD tersebut diparkir terkena sayap pesawat Kyrgyzstan yang juga mendarat di Bandara Erzurum pada 23 Oktober 2011, yang saat itu gempa bumi melanda provinsi Van, Turki.
Selama lebih dari 9 tahun, pesawat itu berada di bandara untuk diperbaiki dan dibawa kembali ke Georgia. (Anadolu Agency/Muhammet Mutaf/Firdaus Wajidi)
entry.summary: Sebuah pesawat kargo Georgia yang mendarat di bandara di sebelah timur Turki sudah lebih dari 9 tahun terbengkalai. Sebelumnya, pesawat kargo Sky Georgia Ilyushing Il-76TD tersebut diparkir terkena sayap pesawat Kyrgyzstan yang juga mendarat di Bandara Erzurum pada 23 Oktober 2011, yang saat itu gempa bumi melanda provinsi Van, Turki. Selama lebih dari 9 tahun, pesawat itu berada di bandara untuk diperbaiki dan dibawa kembali ke Georgia. (Anadolu Agency/Muhammet Mutaf/Firdaus Wajidi)

entry.title: MS Dhoni announces retirement from international cricket Oneindia Kannada

link.title: MS Dhoni announces retirement from international cricket Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದ ಮಾಜಿ ನಾಯಕ, ಕೂಲ್ ಕ್ಯಾಪ್ಟನ್ ಖ್ಯಾತಿಯ ಎಂಎಸ್ ಧೋನಿ ಅಂತಾರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್‌ಗೆ ನಿವೃತ್ತಿ ಘೋಷಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ.
MS Dhoni announces retirement from international cricket via Instagram
entry.summary: ಟೀಮ್ ಇಂಡಿಯಾದ ಮಾಜಿ ನಾಯಕ, ಕೂಲ್ ಕ್ಯಾಪ್ಟನ್ ಖ್ಯಾತಿಯ ಎಂಎಸ್ ಧೋನಿ ಅಂತಾರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್‌ಗೆ ನಿವೃತ್ತಿ ಘೋಷಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. MS Dhoni announces retirement from international cricket via Instagram

entry.title: Michelle Obama Honors the Centennial Anniversary of the 19th Amendment

link.title: Michelle Obama Honors the Centennial Anniversary of the 19th Amendment

entry.content: To mark the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment, guaranteeing and protecting women’s constitutional right to vote, Michelle Obama, on behalf of When We All Vote, reminds us all to register to vote.
entry.summary: To mark the 100th anniversary of the ratification of the 19th Amendment, guaranteeing and protecting women’s constitutional right to vote, Michelle Obama, on behalf of When We All Vote, reminds us all to register to vote.

entry.title: Cette publicité moquée en Chine montre-t-elle un couple homosexuel?

link.title: Cette publicité moquée en Chine montre-t-elle un couple homosexuel?

entry.content: Les internautes chinois se sont beaucoup amusés de cette pub qui présente une relation père-fils.
entry.summary: Les internautes chinois se sont beaucoup amusés de cette pub qui présente une relation père-fils.
